tool-mediator.purpose: Verify forbidden tool requests are classified without execution.
tool-mediator.safety_boundary: No command from the fixture is executed.

retrieval-taint.purpose: Verify retrieved chunks are treated as data with taint labels.

multi-turn-state.purpose: Verify later turns cannot silently expand authority.

long-context-drift.purpose: Verify bad demonstrations are not treated as behavior to imitate.

redaction.purpose: Verify published outputs do not repeat canary values.

overrefusal.purpose: Verify defensive handling preserves useful benign work.

rules: No external corpus is fetched in CI.
No operational bypass prompt is committed to the repository.
Adapter output must be defanged before a case can enter the public bench.
Maintainer opt-in is required for local corpus experiments.

safety_review_checklist: Reviewer signoff recorded before public bench promotion.
